content.en:
Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's two Endless Ancestor Bodies began to fuse, and as the fusion of the two Endless Ancestor Methods became higher and higher, the Ancestor Bodies were also rapidly fused.

This process required the consumption of a large amount of resources, the countless resources that Ye Tian had accumulated over the years, as well as the resources obtained from the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, were taken out one by one to prepare for the attack on the Supreme Ancestor.

His foundation far surpassed that of other top ancestors, and once he broke through to the strongest ancestor, the resources required were several times or even ten times more than those of others.

Fortunately, he was well prepared and therefore did not lack resources.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the top holy beast to attack the strongest holy beast requires at least a breakthrough in the realm years, of course, it can be out of the middle without affecting it at all, after all, Ye Tian is considered to have broken through, and now it is only the process of the transformation of the ancestor's body, and it will not be reversed.

Of course, if Ye Tian doesn't completely break through, he will naturally not get out.

In the blink of an eye, a realm year has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already refined a large amount of resources, and finally completely completed the transformation of the Ancestor Body.

Now, Ye Tian is already the strongest ancestor.

"Ten times, my strength is ten times stronger than in the past!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Before, his strength had been improved to the extreme, and he couldn't improve at all, but now he has just improved and reached a tenfold increase, which can be described as a huge improvement.

Moreover, he had just broken through to the Supreme Ancestor realm, and there was still a period of rapid improvement in strength.

In a short period of time, it is not a problem for him to increase his strength several times again.

In that case, his strength would be dozens of times stronger than when he had not broken through before.

He was not surprised at all by the strength of the Supreme Ancestor, after all, he was extremely powerful at the beginning, but he couldn't beat a Bone Emperor, and he only relied on twenty defensive Ultimate Ancestor Skills to resist a Bone Emperor's blow.

In fact, the Bone Emperor forcibly shuttled through the door, and his strength was suppressed by the Dark Forbidden Domain, and it is estimated that he can only exert thirty percent of his strength, and even paid some price, I am afraid that the injury is not light, in that case, he can easily be suppressed.

If it was an intact Bone Emperor, it would be easy to hurt him.

But now, with his current strength and the many ultimate ancestral skills he has mastered, it is enough to compete with any Bone Emperor and the Supreme Holy Beast.

"You can't make a move against the Haitian Holy Sect first, and then you can do it when your strength becomes stronger. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As a result, he began to frantically absorb and refine countless resources to improve his strength.

Now, he has broken the shackles, so he can continue to improve his cultivation, and his strength will naturally skyrocket, and he can also continue to refine his Endless Ancestor Body, and his strength will increase very quickly.

Realm year after realm year passed, and in the blink of an eye, several realm epochs passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's resources were exhausted.

Originally, he had a lot of resources, not only countless resources collected from the Dark Forbidden Domain, but also resources collected from the Holy Domain Heaven and Earth again and again, but they couldn't stand the speed of the Supreme Ancestor's refining resources.

After several realm epochs of penance, those resources could not be sustained at all, so they were all exhausted.

It can be said that he is now poor.

However, his strength has improved a lot, and he has become several times stronger.

With his current strength, he could definitely easily defeat the two supreme holy beasts of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect.

"It's a pity that we still haven't found a permanent way to build a door!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Not long ago, the copy body entered the sea and sky forbidden land from the holy realm heaven and earth, and he naturally shared his memory, but unfortunately the copy body still didn't find a chance.

It is said that a long time ago, a foreign powerhouse invaded the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth at the time of the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth Tribulation, and was trapped by the major forces at a heavy price, and when the catastrophe was over, the foreign powerhouse could not return to the foreign land, and was directly erased by the rules of the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth, leaving a large number of inheritances, and even the permanent construction method of the door.

The Haitian Holy Sect also belonged to one of the forces at that time, but it was a pity that after some fighting, only three forces finally gave birth to the strongest holy beast.

This is what the copy of the body has learned through inquiry.

It can be said that apart from the three major holy sects, there are almost no other forces that have the permanent construction method of the gate anymore, otherwise they will definitely try to build the permanent construction method of the gate.

"Relying on luck is the way to obtain the permanent construction of the door, so you can only wait for the catastrophe of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth. According to the calculation of time, there is only one dark calendar left in the sacred realm to usher in the great tribulation, and the dark forbidden realm will not usher in the fourth dark calendar for tens of millions of years, and there are still five dark calendars before entering the fourth great tribulation. On the day of the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth Tribulation, I can directly enter the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth from the gate of the Haitian Holy Sect and rush into the Haitian Holy Sect, not only can I rob the Haitian Holy Sect's resources, but I may also hope to obtain the permanent construction method of the gate!"

Ye Tian planned.

Next, while Ye Tian was cultivating, he waited for the catastrophe of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth.

And here, the fourth Dark Holy Land of the Dark Forbidden Land was born, but this time Ye Tian did not participate much, but let the ancestors of the human race fight for it, and he now completely despises a dark holy land.

The Terran is now very strong, and all of his family members have reached the top Ancestor combat power, and there are many Ancestors, many of whom are elite Ancestors, and other forces can't compete with the Terrans at all.

So, he didn't need to worry unless those ancient ancestors woke up to participate.

But those ancient ancestors were all planning for the supreme ancestor, and they couldn't care about a dark holy place.

----------------

Somewhere in the Dark Forbidden Realm, a fourth Dark Sanctuary was born, and one Ancestor after another appeared.

Ancestors such as the Holy Domain, the Ancestor of Destruction, the Realm Ancestor and so on appeared one by one, and many ancestors of the human race also appeared, the leader was Ye Tian's son Ye Xingchen, who also reached the level of the top ancestor, and with the help of Ye Tian, he mastered the three ultimate ancestral skills, which was naturally Ye Tian's wholehearted guidance and display of his ultimate ancestral skills, so that he finally created his own ultimate ancestral skills.

Otherwise, relying on himself, there would be no way to master the three ultimate ancestral techniques in such a short period of time.

"The Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws didn't come?"

The Ancestor of Destruction was surprised.

This is a dark holy land, and the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws is not interested.

"My father doesn't look down on a dark holy place!"

Ye Xingchen sneered.

This moment.

The other Ancestors understood Ye Tian's pursuit, and they must be working hard to impact the Supreme Ancestor just like those ancient ancestors.

It's a pity that they didn't know that Ye Tian had already stepped into the realm of the strongest ancestor.
